item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-003","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant does not directly list a migration checklist. It first reframes the premise: SPA is not obsolete merely because of a trend narrative, and SSR should be chosen based on objective functions such as SEO, LCP/first screen, accessibility, caching cost, ops complexity, team efficiency, and risk. It asks clarifying goal/constraint/evidence questions before giving bounded migration steps, and explicitly advises against one-size-fits-all full-site SSR migration."}
